title: botrychium nordicum
intro: Botrychium nordicum, also known as Northern grape fern, is a type of rare and unusual fern species found in North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the Northern grape fern include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments, but its usage should be done under the guidance of a medical professional.
